subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have created the names and revealed their Book, and therein have enjoined upon them, through My most exalted utterance and My most glorious remembrance, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا خلقنا الاسماء و انزلنا کتابها و وصیناهم فیها باعلی بیانی و ابهی ذکری بان
